info.name: DashAI Backend Testing - Stable Smoke
info.description: Stable smoke test untuk DashAI backend. URL API ditulis eksplisit /api/v1, query optional UUID dikosongkan/dihapus agar tidak memicu 422 saat variable ID belum tersimpan.

exec: // Gunakan variable environment: base_url, access_token, company_id, dll. Semua endpoint API ditulis eksplisit dengan /api/v1.

request.description: Urutan saran: 1) Health, 2) Auth Login, 3) Auth Me, 4) Companies, 5) Modules list, 6) Create sample data, 7) Search/filter, 8) Negative security. Pastikan backend Docker hidup dan seed sudah jalan.

exec: pm.test('DB result is true or status is ok', function () {

request.description: Kalau route ini belum dibuat, 404 masih dimaklumi di fase dev.

exec: pm.test('Redis health endpoint returns 200 or 404 if not implemented', function () { pm.expect([200,404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Ready returns 200 or service unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: POST Login Invalid Password - Should Fail / Rate Limit

request.description: Kirim 5-6x untuk mengetes Redis login rate limit.

exec: pm.test('Invalid login returns 401 or eventually 429', function () { pm.expect([401,429]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: POST Refresh With Invalid Token - Should Fail
POST Logout - Save Old Token Then Revoke
GET Me After Logout - Old Token Should Fail

request.description: Jalankan setelah logout. Token lama harus masuk blacklist Redis.

exec: pm.test('Old token rejected after logout', function () { pm.expect([401,403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Gunakan ini setelah logout supaya request berikutnya punya token lagi.

item.name: GET Products Without Token - Should Fail
GET Products With Invalid Token - Should Fail
GET Finance Accounts Without Token - Should Fail

exec: pm.test('Companies response is array', function () { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Company detail returns 200 or 404 if company_id empty', function () { pm.expect([200,404,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: GET Branches By Company - Save branch_id

exec: pm.test('Branches returns 200 or 404/422 if company_id not set', function () { pm.expect([200,404,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Roles endpoint returns allowed status', function () { pm.expect([200,404,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Permissions endpoint returns 200 or 404 if route differs', function () { pm.expect([200,404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (pm.response.code === 200) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (Array.isArray(json) && json.length > 0) pm.environment.set('permission_id', json[0].id || ''); }

body.raw:
{
  "company_id": "{{{company_id}}}",
  "code": "PM-CAT-{{unique_suffix}}",
  "name": "Postman Category {{unique_suffix}}",
  "description": "Created from complete Postman collection",
  "is_active": true
}

exec: pm.test('Update returns 200 or empty-id error', function () { pm.expect([200,404,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Jika schema product berbeda, cek /docs dan sesuaikan field payload.

body.raw:
{
  "company_id": "{{{company_id}}}",
  "category_id": "{{{product_category_id}}}",

item.name: GET Stock Movements - Optional Custom Route

exec: pm.test('Optional stock movement route returns 200, 404, or 405', function () { pm.expect([200, 404, 405]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

body.raw:
{
  "company_id": "{{{company_id}}}",
  "branch_id": "{{branch_id}}",
  "name": "Postman Lead {{unique_suffix}}",
  "company_name": "Postman Company",
  "email": "lead{{unique_suffix}}@example.com",
  "phone": "08123456789",
  "source": "postman",
  "estimated_value": "5000000.00",
  "status": "new",
  "notes": "Created from complete Postman collection"
}

exec: pm.test('Create contact returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('crm_contact_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create deal returns 201/200 or 422 if required IDs are empty/schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('crm_deal_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create activity returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('crm_activity_id', json.id); }

item.name: POST Close Deal Won - Optional Custom Action

exec: pm.test('Optional custom action returns 200, 404, 405, or 422', function () { pm.expect([200, 404, 405, 422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

exec: pm.test('Optional custom action returns 200, 404, 405, or 422', function () { pm.expect([200, 404, 405, 422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Create attendance returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('attendance_id', json.id); }

if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('leave_type_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create leave request returns 201/200 or 422 if IDs/schema differ', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('leave_request_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create task returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('hr_task_id', json.id); }

pm.test('Create period returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

body.raw:
{
  "company_id": "{{{company_id}}}",
  "account_code": "PM-ACC-{{unique_suffix}}",
  "account_name": "Postman Cash Account {{unique_suffix}}",
  "account_type": "asset",
  "normal_balance": "debit",
  "description": "Created from Postman",
  "is_cash_account": true,
  "is_bank_account": false,
  "is_tax_account": false,
  "is_active": true
}

exec: pm.test('Create account returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('finance_account_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create tax rate returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('finance_tax_rate_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create transaction returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('finance_transaction_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create journal returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('finance_journal_entry_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Create budget returns 201/200 or 422 if schema differs', function () { pm.expect([200,201,422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('finance_budget_id', json.id); }
pm.test('Dashboard returns 200 or 404 if not registered yet', function () { pm.expect([200,404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Invalid Sort Field Should Not Break
Invalid Sort Order Should Return Validation Error

request.description: Postman: New > WebSocket Request. URL: {{ws_url}}{{websocket_path}}. Contoh full: ws://localhost:8000/realtime/ws?token={{access_token}}. Connect lalu kirim: ping. Expected: JSON pong / WebSocket alive. Tanpa token harus ditolak/closed.
